name: Cevapcici (Che-vap-che-chi) (Cevaps for Short)
recipeIngredient: 2 tsp cracked or freshly ground black pepper
seasoned pepper and garlic pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients together thoroughly.
2. You may wish to combine the seasonings or grind them together before adding to the meat.
3. Shape into thumb-sized sausages, or smaller croquette shapes.
4. Grill on an open grill until fully cooked through.
5. Serve with pita bread or hard rolls and onions (raw or sauteed). The smaller size is ideal for appetizers served on toothpicks.
6. Traditionally, cevapcici are not served in barbecue sauce.
